exhibits.title: Seg-CycleGAN: Synthesizing DES Mammograms from Low-Energy Scans
exhibits.description: Began with a Pix2Pix GAN to synthesize Dual-Energy Subtracted (DES) phantoms from low-energy mammograms, enabling radiation-free screening research. The pipeline is now evolving into a Seg-CycleGAN formulation — pairing segmentation-guided attention with cycle-consistency losses — to push high-resolution lesion reconstruction and artifact removal beyond what paired Pix2Pix training could reach.

exhibits.title: Explainable Multi-View Breast Cancer Diagnosis
exhibits.description: A multi-view deep learning framework utilizing 8 CESM views for granular Normal / Benign / Malignant classification. Grad-CAM is integrated throughout so every prediction can be traced back to the radiological features that drove it.

exhibits.title: Advanced Multi-Stage RAG Pipeline for Legal Document QA
exhibits.description: A production-grade RAG system using hybrid retrieval (BM25 + FAISS) to maximize lexical and semantic coverage over legal documents. LLM-based query rewriting generates structured sub-queries, and cross-encoder reranking (MiniLM) filters irrelevant context before generation.

exhibits.title: Agentic AI Research & Report Automation System
exhibits.description: A multi-agent system built with CrewAI — dedicated agents for research, analysis, fact-checking, and report generation under structured orchestration. Real-time search (Serper API) and LangChain-based reasoning drive multi-hop synthesis, with human-in-the-loop checkpoints for reliability.

exhibits.title: Car Damage Assessment System
exhibits.description: An end-to-end damage classification system trained on a custom dataset of 2,300 vehicle images. Switching the backbone from EfficientNet-B0 to ResNet plus automated Optuna tuning lifted accuracy from 57% to 80%, and the model is deployed as a real-time inference service.
